title: cracca pisiformis
intro: Cracca pisiformis, also known as kidney bean or tare, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca pisiformis include treating fever, kidney stones, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving blood circulation. Herbal preparations of Cracca pisiformis often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
